title: Energy Efficiency First: the cases of Poland and Croatia
summary_full: Listen to this podcast, which discusses the implementation of the Energy Efficiency First principle – the idea of ensuring that energy efficiency solutions are considered in planning, policy, and investment. Join us for the 3rd ENEFIRST+ podcast where we focus on the specific cases of Poland and Croatia – where Euractiv’s Christoph Schwaiger speaks with […]
